ddt:Target.Name: HZH_M5Rk_4D10_20131219
ddt:Target.Description:
[N]Initial Create: 2003/10/06 NISSAN KR6 K.Asami 2003/10/06 NISSAN KR6 K.Konishi
[1]Add "CAN DIAG SUPPORT MNTR.can" Add ReadFreezeFrameData 2003/10/15 NISSAN KR6 K.Asami
[2]Add readVIN 2003/10/17 NISSAN KR6 K.Yamauchi
[3]Mod ReadDTC Mod Nissan's system identifier 2004/01/14 NISSAN KR6 K.Konishi
[4]Correcting and Adding: 2004/11/22 KR6 K.Yamauchi Adding : - FFD reading Correcting : - I/O request
This file has been verified according to DBChecker and ECU Specifications. This file is in accordance with NamingRuleOfECUDescription_V2.16 - Routine request
[5]Correcting 2005/1/12 KR6 K.Yamauchi - Parameter format of WBDLID LID$02 - Parameter format of IOBCLID LID$0C
[6]Add CID, IOLID, WDBLID, SRBLID 2006/10/5 NISSAN XX4 G.Miwa
[7]Corrected in P32M 2006/10/05 XX4 K.Konishi
[8]Correcting 2006/10/19 XX4 G.Miwa g-miwa@mail.nissan.co.jp
[9] 2007/9/24 Auto-identification was modified. Device name was modified. NISSAN XX4 T.shida
2007/9/28 NISSAN XX4 T.Shida Support Check was add.
[10] 2007/10/04 XX4 T.Matsuoka Add CID(1182) and data("IOLID=07H_IGNTMG.param") for OutputControl takenori-matsuoka@mail.nissan.co.jp
[[2.17]]
[11] 2007/10/24T.Shida OutPutControl.status and OutPutControl.stop was add. NISSAN XX4 T.Shida
[12] 2007/11/08 T.Shida OutPutControl request was added. OutPutControl.status request was added. NISSAN XX4 T.Shida
[13] 2008/04/16 XX4 T.Matsuoka
[14] 2008/06/27 D.Muramatsu modify for FFV
[15] 2008/07/01 D.Muramatsu IOLID=54H_SubTank_SOL revised IOLID=55H_SubTank_RLY revised
[16]2008/11/27 NISSAN XX4 R.Urushihata Modified a templete[ReadDTC] [[2.17]]
[17] 2009/2/4 G.Miwa Modify $1101 COOLANT TEMP coding
[18] 2009/07/23 Modify for some RDBCID added some RDBCID and 218F and some DTCcode
[19] 2009/10/16 Add item RoutineEntryOption to RoutineStart.RoutineStartIDs and RoutineStop.RoutineStopIDs. [[2.17]]
[20] 2009/12/07 K.Jousyu Add item RMBA request.
[21] 2012/11/28 S.Shiota Add Read DTC Modify , Clear DTC & FFD
[22] 2013/12/18 EJL Add DID and DTC information for HZH M5Rk
[[2.17]]

Item.Text: Factory quick TAS learning clear routine
SRT support mode for Purge System diagnosis
Starter motor drive system check routine
Long term fuel trimming initialize routine

Data.Name: RoutineEntryStatus
Data.Comment: Routine entry status for recive data

Data.Name: RoutineEntryOption
Data.Comment: Routine entry status for recive data

Item.Text: Detected failure/Network voltage too high at cranking
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
A Camshaft Position-Timing Over Advanced or SystemPerformance[P0011]
Hall IC Camshaft Position (Phase) Sensor (Exhaust side) Circuit Open
Ring Gear Crankshaft Position Sensor B Circuit(short)
Engine stop position recognition ringgear crankangle sensor interruption/noise/missing pulse
Internal Control Module Monitoring Processor Performance
Internal Control Module A/D Processing Performance
Learning G sensor 0 points unfinished diagnoses[P158A]
Sub-pump relay drive circuit GND shorted[P3077]
Sub-pump relay drive circuit VB shorted[P3078]
[D133]IPA wheel pulse rapid change history error
[D134]IPA wheel pulse rapid change history error
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Fuel temperature sensor in GAS tank
Electric control EGR target step position

ON-OFF system air fluidized device on DC motor(for inline checker)
